title: clerodendrum philippinum var. simplex
intro: Clerodendrum philippinum var. simplex is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Philippine glory bower or Philippine glory vine. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antiseptic and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
